title: Snailclimb/JavaGuide
summary: JavaGuide 是一个全面的 Java 面试与后端通用面试指南，涵盖计算机基础、数据库、分布式、高并发、系统设计及 AI 应用开发等核心主题。该项目在 GitHub 上拥有 157k+ Star，标签包括 agent、ai、context-engineering、deepseek、mcp、springai 等，体现了其与 AI/LLM 技术栈的紧密关联。作为技术面试准备资源，它整合了现代 AI 应用开发实践，适合后端工程师和 AI 开发者参考。
summary_en: JavaGuide is a comprehensive Java interview and backend interview guide covering computer fundamentals, databases, distributed systems, high concurrency, system design, and AI application development. With over 157k stars on GitHub, its tags include agent, ai, context-engineering, deepseek, mcp, springai, reflecting strong ties to AI/LLM tech stacks. As a technical interview resource, it integrates modern AI application development practices, suitable for backend engineers and AI developers.
